output.summary: Combines Int6 quantized 9-layer GQA + 3×MLP, SmearGate, BigramHash, Muon+SWA training with test-time SGD adaptation and honest stride-32 eval.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Uses standard training plus test-time training on validation; not a val-only training regime.
techniques: Int6 quantized 9-layer GQA transformer with 3×MLP, SmearGate, and BigramHash
Orthogonal init with Muon optimizer, momentum warmup, and SWA checkpoint averaging
Test-time full-model SGD on validation shards with frozen early blocks and stride-32 sliding eval
